claims.text: We claim: 1. A contraceptive kit for use by a woman after unprotected sexual intercourse, comprising: one pregnancy detection device that detects hCG in urine in an amount between about 20 and about 2...

use_codes.desc: KIT ADAPTED AND DESIGNED TO PROVIDE BOTH DATA ON THE CURRENT REPRODUCTIVE STATUS OF A PATIENT AND CONTRACEPTION FOR THOSE WHO ARE NOT PREGNANT, BUT RECENTLY ENGAGED IN UNPROTECTED SEX
